evals.prompt: My counter app at apps/broken-counter-app/ has two bugs: (1) clicking 'Ask AI about this number' does nothing in local dev, and (2) when it does run inside Apogee, if the AI request ever fails, subsequent requests hang forever and I have to restart Apogee. Please diagnose and fix both issues, then rebuild.
evals.expected_output: App.jsx fixed to use getShellAPI/getOasisHost wrapper instead of window.OasisHost directly; release() moved into a finally block; webai.js created with canonical helpers; vite.config.js fixed to use vite-plugin-singlefile; package.json given a description; app builds successfully.

assertions.name: no_direct_window_oasishost
assertions.description: App.jsx no longer accesses window.OasisHost directly

assertions.name: release_in_finally
assertions.description: release() is called inside a finally block
